page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package provides version 1.1 of the 'HTSlib' C library for high-throughput sequence analysis. It is primarily useful to developers of other R packages who wish to make use of HTSlib.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package provides version 1.1 of the 'HTSlib' C library for high-throughput sequence analysis. It is primarily useful to developers of other R packages who wish to make use of HTSlib.
